9.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:N/SC:H/SI:H/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-23", "name": "Relative Path Traversal"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-26", "name": "Path Traversal: '/dir/../filename'"}], "description": "### Impact
`S3FileMiddleware` is vulnerable to relative path traversal attacks, where an attacker can use a modified request to escape pre-signed upload locations and have the Django application load files from random locations into `request.FILES`

Depending on how files are handled, this may lead to confidentiality and integrity issues.

### Patches
Django-S3File urges all users to update to a patched version >=7.0.2.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00564, "percentile": 0.42542}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-67qg-7284-2277", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-05T20:05:49Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-67qg-7284-2277", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-67qg-7284-2277"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42196"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-12T22:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-05-05T20:05:49Z", "references": ["https://github.com/codingjoe/django-s3file/security/advisories/GHSA-67qg-7284-2277", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42196", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-67qg-7284-2277"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/codingjoe/django-s3file/security-advisories/GHSA-67qg-7284-2277", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/codingjoe/django-s3file", "summary": "django-s3file is vulnerable to relative path traversal", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T16:31:46Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-67qg-7284-2277", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "7.0.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "django-s3file"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 7.0.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: django-s3file is vulnerable to relative path traversal
